_comment: Investment-philosophy archetypes for 70_backtest/71__run_backtest. Each archetype is a list of [metric, op, threshold] predicates evaluated point-in-time on a fiscal year's metrics (from financials_metrics), plus a holdings cap and a ranking rule used when more names pass than the cap. Metric names MUST match labels stored in financials_metrics / metrics_hierarchy.json. Editing this file does NOT require code changes. Ops: < <= > >= == !=.

config._as_of_lag_days_doc: When the 10-K filing date is unavailable, a fiscal year's metrics are treated as knowable only from period_end + this many days (filing-lag proxy). Enforces no look-ahead.
config._risk_free_doc: Annual risk-free rate for the Sharpe ratio (decimal, 0.04 = 4%).
config._benchmark_doc: Benchmark ticker priced from market_prices_daily. If absent there, benchmark columns are NULL and the run degrades gracefully.

graham_defensive.description: Graham defensive value — cheap on earnings and book, liquid, profitable.

lynch_garp.description: Growth at a reasonable price (Lynch-style). NOTE: PEG is not a stored metric — approximated via a modest P/E combined with strong earnings growth.

quality_compounder.description: High-quality compounders — high returns on capital, healthy margins, modest leverage.
